2604.27308.title: BoostLoRA: Growing Effective Rank by Boosting Adapters
2604.27308.paper_summary: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods face a tradeoff between adapter size and expressivity: ultra-low-parameter adapters are confined to fixed low-rank subspaces, capping performance even with extended training. We propose BoostLoRA, a gradient-boosting framework that overcomes this limit by iteratively training and merging minimal adapters on the examples the current model gets wrong. A ROTATE SVD basis strategy assigns each round to an orthogonal subspace, so cumulative effective rank grows linearly with the number of rounds while each adapter remains ultra-low-rank. After merging, adapters are discarded, leaving zero inference overhead. On Qwen2.5-3B, BoostLoRA reaches 89.1% on GSM8K and 68.8% on MATH-500, surpassing both the best single-shot ultra-low parameter adapter (TinyLoRA) and full fine-tuning; on code generation it reaches 57.2% on MBPP and 80.4% on HumanEval while full fine-tuning drops below the zero-shot baseline. We also demonstrate cross-architecture transfer on protein binding classification with ESM2-650M and cross-entropy training. BoostLoRA is, to our knowledge, the first PEFT method whose effective rank grows with training, separating per-round parameter cost from total representational capacity.
2604.27308.paper_summary_zh: 參數高效微調（PEFT）方法面臨適配器大小和表達能力之間的權衡：超低參數適配器被限制在固定的低秩子空間中，即使在擴展訓練下也無法提高性能。我們提出了BoostLoRA，一種通過迭代訓練和合併最小適配器來克服這一限制的梯度提升框架，針對當前模型錯誤的例子進行操作。一種ROTATE SVD基礎策略將每一輪分配給一個正交子空間，因此累積有效秩隨著輪次的增加而線性增長，同時每個適配器保持超低秩。在合併後，適配器被丟棄，沒有額外的推理開銷。在Qwen2.5-3B上，BoostLoRA在GSM8K上達到89.1%，在MATH-500上達到68.8%，超越了最佳單次超低參數適配器（TinyLoRA）和完整微調；在代碼生成方面，它在MBPP上達到57.2%，在HumanEval上達到80.4%，而完整微調則低於零-shot基線。我們還展示了在蛋白質結合分類中使用ESM2-650M和交叉熵訓練的跨架構轉移。據我們所知，BoostLoRA是第一個隨著訓練而增長有效秩的PEFT方法，將每輪的參數成本與總表現能力分開。
2604.27308.author: Raviteja Anantha et.al.
2604.27308.authors: Raviteja Anantha, Nick Levato, Layne C. Price
